segments.text: I commend unto you Phebe our sister, which is a servant of the church which is at Cenchrea:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That ye receive her in the Lord, as becometh saints, and that ye assist her in whatsoever business she hath need of you: for she hath been a succourer of many, and of myself also.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Greet Priscilla and Aquila my helpers in Christ Jesus:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Who have for my life laid down their own necks: unto whom not only I give thanks, but also all the churches of the Gentiles.
Likewise greet the church that is in their house. Salute my wellbeloved Epaenetus, who is the firstfruits of Achaia unto Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Greet Mary, who bestowed much labour on us.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Andronicus and Junia, my kinsmen, and my fellowprisoners, who are of note among the apostles, who also were in Christ before me.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Greet Amplias my beloved in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Urbane, our helper in Christ, and Stachys my beloved.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Apelles approved in Christ. Salute them which are of Aristobulus' household.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Herodion my kinsman. Greet them that be of the household of Narcissus, which are in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Tryphena and Tryphosa, who labour in the Lord. Salute the beloved Persis, which laboured much in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Rufus chosen in the Lord, and his mother and mine.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermas, Patrobas, Hermes, and the brethren which are with them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute Philologus, and Julia, Nereus, and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints which are with them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Salute one another with an holy kiss.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: The churches of Christ salute you.
Now I beseech you, brethren, mark them which cause divisions and offences contrary to the doctrine which ye have learned; and avoid them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For they that are such serve not our Lord Jesus Christ, but their own belly; and by good words and fair speeches deceive the hearts of the simple.
For your obedience is come abroad unto all men. I am glad therefore on your behalf: but yet I would have you wise unto that which is good, and simple concerning evil.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And the God of peace shall bruise Satan under your feet shortly.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Amen.
Timotheus my workfellow, and Lucius, and Jason, and Sosipater, my kinsmen, salute you.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: I Tertius, who wrote this epistle, salute you in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Tertius

segments.text: Gaius mine host, and of the whole church, saluteth you. Erastus the chamberlain of the city saluteth you, and Quartus a brother.
segments.speaker: Gaius, Erastus, Quartus

segments.text: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Amen.
Now to him that is of power to stablish you according to my gospel, and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery, which was kept secret since the world began,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But now is made manifest, and by the scriptures of the prophets, according to the commandment of the everlasting God, made known to all nations for the obedience of faith:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: To God only wise, be glory through Jesus Christ for ever.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Amen.
